response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM internals, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE tooling — key requirements for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only peripheral Java exposure in early roles without evidence of deep JVM or IDE subsystem expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer education
Experience with CI/CD, testing frameworks, and dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No clear recent or deep Java/Kotlin enterprise tooling experience
Absence of Spring, Hibernate, or application server integration work
IDE internals and JVM language tooling expertise not demonstrated
